content:
💡 pocketpaw | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with a private, self-hosted personal AI assistant that can be easily installed and integrated into their daily communication workflows.
✨ Key Features: • Self-hosted AI agent • Desktop installer with UI • Web dashboard • Multi-platform communication (Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Telegram, Browser) • No subscription or cloud lock-in
📖 Summary: PocketPaw is a self-hosted, open-source personal AI agent designed for quick deployment. It offers a desktop installer and a web dashboard, allowing users to interact with their AI through various platforms like Discord, Slack, and Telegram, ensuring data privacy and avoiding cloud lock-in.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
